query: UPDATE island_guides SET flightInfo = 'Fuvahmulah Airport (FVM) - Direct domestic flights available. Fastest option for reaching Fuvahmulah. Alternatively, fly to Malé International Airport (MLE) and take a speedboat or domestic flight.', nearbyAirports = '[{"name":"Fuvahmulah Airport","iataCode":"FVM","distance":"On island","description":"Direct domestic flights available. Fastest option for reaching Fuvahmulah."},{"name":"Malé International Airport","iataCode":"MLE","distance":"50-100 km","description":"International flights. Then speedboat or domestic flight to Fuvahmulah."}]' WHERE name = 'Feidhoo';
